problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: Combining Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
